connectivity.message: Live network disabled for deterministic flow test.

improvement_plan.title: Strengthen originality and contribution
improvement_plan.action: Convert descriptive material into synthesis: what is combined, what gap remains, and what the researcher contributes without overclaiming.
improvement_plan.evidence: Originality score is 46.2; contribution may not be sufficiently defended.

improvement_plan.title: Strengthen citation signal
improvement_plan.action: Add real citations to unsupported factual claims. Use the suggested citations below or find verified sources for each claim. Normalize citation style to APA 7 format without inventing sources.
improvement_plan.evidence: Citation quality is 8.0; citation coverage is 11.1% across claim-like sentences. 0 real citation suggestion(s) found from open research sources.

improvement_plan.title: Improve Whole Document (Pages 1–13)
improvement_plan.action: Revise pages 1–13 for citation support, original contribution while preserving claims, TOC headings, and citations.
improvement_plan.evidence: [Page-Wise Audit Pages 1–13] Whole Document scores: AI risk 10.8, originality 46.2, citation 8.0, structure 86.7.

improvement_plan.title: Identify and draft required diagrams
improvement_plan.action: After approval, detect methodology/process/model sections and draft academic diagrams only where they clarify the argument.
improvement_plan.evidence: Diagram generation is optional and requires separate approval in the rewrite options.

improvement_plan.title: Apply APA 7 checks
improvement_plan.action: Check headings, references, tables/figures, and style conventions against the selected target format.

improvement_plan.title: Maintain TOC, list of tables, and list of figures
improvement_plan.action: Preserve heading hierarchy, table captions, figure captions, page-aware front matter, and export-ready DOCX/PDF structure.
improvement_plan.evidence: Required for APA 7 output and final submission polish.

integrity_report.title: OTIF Academic Integrity Evidence Report
recommended_next_actions: Maintain TOC, list of tables, and list of figures
